_README: Leakage ledger for the holdout backtests. For each tournament, ratings_asof is the cutoff date through which result data was allowed to inform the ratings/signals in data/backtest_<label>.csv. A backtest is leakage-free ONLY if ratings_asof <= tournament_start; src.backtest.leakage_check() enforces this and also asserts tournament_start matches the first match date in the CSV, so a wrong/stale manifest is caught. Dates are YYYY-MM-DD.

2022.ratings: Official FIFA ranking points — last release before the tournament (2022-10-06). Elo columns derived from results before kickoff.

euro2020.ratings: Derived World Football Elo from results strictly before kickoff (src/elo.snapshot_before); form/h2h signals computed as-of the start date.

euro2024.ratings: Derived World Football Elo from results strictly before kickoff (src/elo.snapshot_before); form/h2h signals computed as-of the start date.

wc2014.ratings: Derived World Football Elo from results strictly before kickoff (src/elo.snapshot_before); form/h2h signals computed as-of the start date.

wc2018.ratings: Derived World Football Elo from results strictly before kickoff (src/elo.snapshot_before); form/h2h signals computed as-of the start date.
